race.description: Regional Waste Water Group Maiden Plate
race.comment: FABS CUZ (2) has been working up to a maiden victory placing at his past couple of outings and this is not an overly strong affair. Rider Sandkhul has been in the saddle for the past couple of efforts and again gets the benefit of her 2kg claim. Should be right there at the business end. PROUD MISS (10) was a touch disappointing at the latest effort but the form prior was full of merit. Capable of bouncing right back. BLOOD RED (1) returned in good order with a solid third at the Gold Coast and will strip fitter for that hit-out. Sure to give this a mighty shake. IRISH ACCOLADE (3) was too bad to be true last time but go on the third at the Sunny Coast two back. May earn some minor money. EXODINI (5) best of the rest.
